title: useFetch
description: Abstract the data-fetching logic into a reusable custom hook.
problemStatement:
Clean up components! Write a custom hook `useFetch(url)` that returns an object `{ data, loading }`. Inside the hook, use `useEffect` to fetch data from the provided URL and update the state.

**Requirement:** Handle the 'loading' state correctly (true during fetch, false after).
hints: Hooks allow you to extract complex logic and share it across multiple components.
expectedOutput: An object { data, loading } from the custom hook
